scene1_hook: Abandoned in the dark of night, a helpless cry echoes through the streets of Pittsburgh.
scene2_problem: In Allegheny County, over 10,000 animals are abandoned each year. Many never find their way back home.
scene3_stakes: Their stories go untold, but the pain and suffering remain – a harsh reality we can't ignore.
scene4_solution: Animal Rescue Pittsburgh is dedicated to rescuing abandoned dogs and cats. Your donation provides life-saving care and second chances.
scene5_ask: Help us give hope to those who've lost their way. Donate $25 today at animalrescuepgh.org/donate
tagline: Giving Hope, One Rescue at a Time
